ability: 每个夜晚，所有存活的玩家要提交一条咒语或一条不会被抽取的空白咒语。每个咒语至多60个字，且需附带一个至多5字的准确或富有创意的名称。
firstNightReminder: Publicly call for all players to submit Spells. When everyone has submitted, draw Spells.
otherNightReminder: Publicly call for all living players to submit Spells. When every living player has submitted, draw Spells.
